channel.title: Search on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Search on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot-authored pull requests now included in author searches
item.description:
Pull request searches using the author: qualifier now include pull requests opened by the Copilot cloud agent on a user’s behalf. For example, author:@me on GitHub pull requests will return those Copilot-authored PRs as well.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot Chat now sees your agent sessions
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Chat on the web now has a better handoff to Copilot cloud agent sessions. It also adds the ability to search and query past agent sessions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Domain filter for specialized model discovery in Foundry model catalog
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry model catalog now includes a domain filter in public preview. It helps users narrow the catalog of more than 1,900 models by industry or use case.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Semantic reranker in Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now supports a public preview of semantic reranker, which reorders query or search results based on contextual relevance. It analyzes the meaning of both the query and data to improve result relevance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Semantic issue search in Copilot Chat
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Chat on the web now supports natural-language issue search, grouping, and analysis using a new semantic issues index. Results are context-aware and intended to help users find relevant issues more quickly.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, April releases
item.description:
GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code changelog covers VS Code releases v1.116 through v1.119 from April and early May 2026. The post notes that Copilot can now search by meaning.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Search and filter bar for repository security advisories
item.description:
GitHub added a search bar and filters to the Security tab’s repository security advisories list. This lets you search and narrow advisories directly within a repository.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Improved search for GitHub Issues is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub says improved search for Issues is now generally available. It was previously in public preview and later added to the Issues dashboard.

  • Source: GitHub
